summary: 4 services tested. v0: h2_end_stream=2 resolved ERR_HTTP2, block message received but UI stuck on Thinking (BLOCK_ONLY). gamma: 400 Bad Request confirmed, no visible warning (BLOCK_ONLY). perplexity: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on SSE, page returned to home with no warning (BLOCK_ONLY). github_copilot: 403 confirmed, Access denied page shown but custom message NOT displayed (BLOCK_ONLY).

findings.h2_end_stream_fix: CONFIRMED — h2_end_stream=2 resolved ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Status 200 returned instead of protocol error.
findings.response_body: {"error": true, "message": "⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다..."}
findings.ui_display: UI remains stuck on 'Thinking' spinner. The v0_json template error message is in the response body but v0 frontend does not render it as visible text to the user.
findings.console_errors: No ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR (fix confirmed). Response received as application/json with block message.

services.verdict: BLOCK_ONLY — APF block works (h2_end_stream=2 fix confirmed), but warning text is NOT displayed in the UI. v0 frontend ignores the error JSON and shows infinite Thinking state.

findings.block_confirmed: 400 Bad Request returned by APF gamma_sse template
findings.response_body: Failed to load response data — connection terminated by APF before response body could be captured
findings.ui_display: Gamma outline editor shown with prompt text, but generation did not occur. No visible error message or warning text displayed to user.
findings.console_errors: POST 400 (Bad Request) for ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation. StreamOnOpenError: Unable to complete request.

services.verdict: BLOCK_ONLY — APF blocks the generation request with 400, but gamma frontend shows no error/warning to the user. Generation silently fails.

findings.block_confirmed: APF intercepted the SSE stream. ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR occurred on perplexity_ask endpoint.
findings.blocked_thread_status: 400 Bad Request when Perplexity tried to fetch the blocked thread data
findings.ui_display: Page returned to home (perplexity.ai/?). No visible warning text shown to user. Query was silently consumed.
findings.console_errors: POST net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on perplexity_ask. GET 400 (Bad Request) on blocked thread fetch.
findings.h2_end_stream_note: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR still occurs on perplexity — the h2_end_stream=2 fix may not be applied to perplexity_sse template, or perplexity handles h2 differently.

services.verdict: BLOCK_ONLY — APF blocks the SSE stream but warning text is NOT displayed. Perplexity returns to home page with no indication of what happened. ERR_HTTP2 still present.

findings.block_confirmed: 403 Forbidden returned by APF copilot_403 template
findings.ui_display: GitHub shows 'Access denied. You do not have permission to view this.' with Terms of Service link. This is GitHub's default 403 error page, NOT the APF custom message.
findings.retry_button: Retry button shown in chat UI
findings.console_errors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 ()
findings.note: GitHub Copilot renders its own Access Denied page for 403 responses. The APF copilot_403 template message field content is NOT rendered in the UI.

services.verdict: BLOCK_ONLY — APF 403 block works, but GitHub shows its own 'Access denied' page. Custom warning text from APF template is not displayed.

overall_conclusion.recommendation: All 4 services show BLOCK_ONLY behavior. None display the APF custom warning text to users. Warning implementation requires service-specific frontend injection strategies (chat bubble injection, error message interception, etc.) rather than relying on response body content being rendered by the service frontend.
